_meta.publish_status_2026-06-03: PUBLISHED (state=done, permanent): masked-causes, coarsening-synthesis, mdrelax, scrna, weaksup. HELD as drafts (state=unsubmitted): spatial, dp, phenotype (sim-only scaffolds, per the fold-into-synthesis strategy; publish later with real data). Verified server-side.
_meta.verified: Every entry verified server-side. The five flagship/weighted papers are now published; the three scaffolds remain drafts. Do not hand-edit; regenerate from the Zenodo API.
_meta.cite_doi_convention: Sibling bibliographies cite the CONCEPT DOI (resolves to the latest published version). For first-deposit papers the concept DOI is the parent of the reserved version DOI.
_meta.publish_order_suggestion: Publish masked-causes first, then the synthesis and mdrelax, then the four application papers, so that sibling concept DOIs already resolve when each citing paper goes live.
_meta.pending_step: After the synthesis paper (10.5281/zenodo.20533913) is published, propagate light 'see also' cross-references to it in the four application scaffolds (spatial, dp, weaksup, phenotype). Do NOT add load-bearing cites to scrna or masked-causes (self-contained for external venues), and never cite the synthesis from the foundational masked-causes paper (the synthesis cites it, not vice versa).
known_orphans_user_action: 10.5281/zenodo.20414723: PUBLISHED duplicate of masked-causes under the alternate title 'Distribution-agnostic likelihood...' (own concept 20414722). Prior-session artifact, not API-deletable. Per author 2026-05-29, left orphaned; nothing cites it.
10.5281/zenodo.20423241: second PUBLISHED mdrelax record (own concept 20423240). Per author 2026-05-30, left orphaned; canonical mdrelax is concept 20414727. Nothing cites it.

coarsening-synthesis.note: First deposit (fresh this session). Flagship synthesis paper. Corrected location-family consistency theorem (Gaussian-iff boundary, Teicher 1961) and settled weak-supervision rate integrated. Once published, becomes the cross-reference target for the four application scaffolds.

masked-causes-in-series-systems.note: Refreshed this session: i.n.i.d. covariate extension (Remark 8, Hoadley 1971), CAR-overclaim softened, contributions reordered.

mdrelax.note: Not stale this session; deposited PDF already current.

scrna-coarsening.note: Refreshed this session: liver-overclaim corrected, implied-shift reframed, DECENT reframed, Sarkar-Stephens 2021 added. External venue (Genome Biology): keep self-contained, do not make the synthesis cite load-bearing.

spatial-coarsening.note: Refreshed this session (concept-DOI bib + review fixes). Application scaffold: candidate target for a synthesis 'see also' cross-ref once synthesis is published.

dp-coarsening.note: Refreshed this session. Release-consistency corollary is the n=1 single-release case (confirmed safe under the corrected location-family theorem).

weaksup-coarsening.note: Refreshed this session: T4 settled (Theta(r/gap^2) for L2 recovery, trace-bound upper + Gaussian-location-minimax lower), r defined as degeneracy dimension, conjecture framing removed.

phenotype-coarsening.note: Refreshed this session (concept-DOI bib + review fixes).
